title: Acquisition of Land (United States Air Bases) Act
text:
ACQUISITION OF LAND (UNITED STATES AIR BASES) [IV – 89
ACQUISITION OF LAND (UNITED STATES AIR BASES)
Act No. 34 of 1940
ACQUISITION OF LAND (UNITED STATES AIR
BASES)
An Act to amend the Acquisition of Land Act and to 34 of 1940
implement an agreement made between the government 17 of 1941
of the United States of America and His Majesty’s
government concerning air bases in the colony.
[Commencement 19th December, 1940]
1. This Act may be cited as the Acquisition of Short title.
Land (United States Air Bases) Act.
2. It is hereby declared that the term “public Interpretation.
purpose” as used in The Acquisition of Land Act includes 17 of 1941, s. 2.
the purpose of acquiring land by the Governor in Council Ch. 196.
at the Island of Great Exuma to implement any Agreement
which may be made between the Government of the United
States of America and His Majesty’s Government
concerning the acquisition of air bases in the Colony.
3. The Treasurer is hereby authorised to pay out of Treasurer
the Public Treasury by warrant in the usual manner for the authorised to pay
compensation.
compensation of such persons as may have an interest in
land acquired for the purpose stated in section 2 of this
Act, such sum as may be determined whether by
agreement, arbitration or compulsory purchase in accor-
dance with the provisions of the Principal Act and the
approval of the Governor in Council
4. The Governor in Council, or such person as the Governor in
Governor in Council shall appoint, may grant a lease of Council may
grant lease.
land acquired under the authority of this Act and of the
Acquisition of Land Act for the purpose of implementing
the agreement referred to in section 2 of this Act.
